No-regret always finds a pure Nash equilibrium
Regret must be zero every round
Multiplicative weights is unrelated to regret minimization
questions.answer: Vanishing external regret leads to coarse correlated equilibrium
questions.explanation: External no-regret learning converges to the set of CCE.
